cards.name: Root Fossil
cards.text: Play Root Fossil as if it were a Basic Pokémon. While in play, Root Fossil counts as a Colorless Pokémon (as well as a Trainer card). Can't retreat or be affected by Special Conditions. If Knocked Out, doesn't count as a Knocked Out Pokémon.

abilities.name: Spongy Stone
abilities.text: At any times between turns, remove 1 damage counter from Root Fossil.

tests.name: spongy_stone_heals
tests.description: Test that Spongy Stone removes damage counter between turns
